string.name: hiUser
string.comment: %s is the title+username e.g. 'GM ABC' or simply ABC if there is no title

resources.string: Cu ce te-ai ocupat anul acesta?
Nu ai jucat niciun joc în acest an.

string.name: gamesYouWon
string.comment: %s is the number of games won

string.name: malwareWarningCta
string.comment:
Part of a longer sentence "But other websites do, so please be careful."
Appears in the context of noting that Lichess served zero ads. The text links to https://lichess.org/ads

string.name: shareableSpentPlaying
string.comment:
Subtitle to the translated time they have spent playing
Will be rendered like: "1 day, 2 hours spent playing"

string.name: shareableMostPlayedOpponent
string.comment:
Subtitle to the username of the opponent you have played the most games against
Will be rendered like: "GM Magnus most played opponent"
(where GM Magnus is the title+username of the player)

string.name: recapReady
string.comment: %s is the year of the recap
